title: MoonNight
description: A modpack for my St. Aurelius server.
body:
![Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c79523f2a843ff81953d223fb20380de24e2c8c.jpeg)
**This modpack is made specifically for my server, St. Aurelius. It features quality-of-life mods that improve the ambience and control of vanilla Minecraft:**

🪽 **_Advancement Plagues_**

🪽 **_Better Clouds_**

🪽 **_Explosive Enhancements_**

🪽 **_Better Third Person_**

🪽 **_Falling Leaves_**

🪽 **_Iris Shaders_**

🪽 **_Immersive Thunder_**

🪽 **_Leaf Me Alone_**

**Resource packs to improve the overall look:**

🌙 **_Faithless_**

🌙 **_Fresh Animations_**

🌙 **_Fresh Moves_**

**And feature mods that add to the overall gameplay experience, without feeling like a different game:**

⚙️ **_Create_**

⚙️ **_Supplementaries_**

⚙️ **_Amendments_**

⚙️ **_Exposure_**

⚙️ **_Farmer's Delight_**

_This is not a comprehensive list of the modpack._
![San Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27cf75c92084b0d58ca0c7d10cb53d3677445b44.jpeg)
